ASSET_LISTING_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.0.QUESTION: Qual é o melhor serviço de listagem de criptomoedas?
ASSET_LISTING_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.1.QUESTION: O que acontece depois que meu token de criptomoeda é listado na ChangeNOW?
ASSET_LISTING_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.1.ANSWER: Uma vez que seu ativo esteja disponível na ChangeNOW, ele pode ser negociado na plataforma. Ele ganha exposição a um público mais amplo, acesso à liquidez de provedores integrados e o potencial de aumento no volume de negociação. Isso também possibilita oportunidades de parceria, incluindo co-marketing e engajamento comunitário, apoiando o crescimento futuro.
ASSET_LISTING_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.2.QUESTION: Quais são os requisitos para listagem de ativos?
ASSET_LISTING_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.3.ANSWER: Se um ativo não atender às condições padrão, a ChangeNOW oferece serviços de listagem de câmbio de criptomoedas que ajudam a habilitar a integração. Projetos podem usar Market Making ou uma Ponte Multichain para fornecer liquidez operacional e suportar a funcionalidade de câmbio. A equipe também pode recomendar a abordagem mais adequada com base na configuração do ativo.
ASSET_LISTING_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.4.QUESTION: Uma moeda ou token pode ser removido da listagem?
ASSET_LISTING_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.2.ANSWER: Os requisitos padrão para listagem de câmbio de criptomoedas na ChangeNOW dependem de onde o ativo é negociado. Ele deve estar disponível em uma CEX ou DEX e ter um par de negociação suportado (como BTC ou USDT). Para ativos DEX, o par deve atingir pelo menos US$ 100.000 em volume total. Para ativos CEX, o par deve ter pelo menos US$ 300.000 em volume de negociação diário.
ASSET_LISTING_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.4.ANSWER: Sim. Os ativos podem ser removidos se não atenderem mais aos requisitos acordados. Isso pode acontecer se o volume de negociação cair abaixo de US$ 100.000, o projeto for publicamente identificado como um golpe, as autoridades legais exigirem a remoção, ou com base em uma decisão interna da ChangeNOW. A equipe pode entrar em contato para discutir a situação, se necessário. Você também pode saber mais em nossos Termos de listagem de ativos.
ASSET_LISTING_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.5.QUESTION: Quanto tempo leva o processo de listagem?
ASSET_LISTING_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.6.QUESTION: Quanto custa listar uma moeda ou token?
ASSET_LISTING_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.6.ANSWER: O custo depende da complexidade da integração e do tempo necessário para a implementação. O preço é determinado individualmente para cada ativo. Parceiros existentes podem receber descontos com base em seu volume mensal. Para receber um cálculo de preço para seu ativo, preencha nosso formulário de listagem.
ASSET_LISTING_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.5.ANSWER:
Os prazos de listagem variam de acordo com o tipo de rede e a complexidade da integração. Geralmente seguimos estes prazos:
  • Tokens em redes populares como ERC20, BEP20 ou TRC20 normalmente levam até uma semana.
  • Tokens em redes menos comuns geralmente levam cerca de duas semanas.
  • Integrações completas de blockchain ou mainnet: construir uma integração de rede personalizada leva entre duas e oito semanas.
Nossa equipe fornece uma estimativa específica no início do processo, após a análise inicial do ativo.

AI_HUB_PAGE.PRODUCT_FAMILY.LIST.SECOND.S: Nossa especificação OpenAPI oferece a desenvolvedores e produtos de IA uma forma legível por máquina de entender endpoints, operações e fluxos de integração.

AI_HUB_PAGE.WHAT_NEXT.TITLE: O que vem a seguir
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHAT_NEXT.LIST.FIRST.TITLE: Conjunto de ferramentas compartilhado
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHAT_NEXT.LIST.FIRST.TEXT: Em vez de várias ferramentas isoladas, sua experiência se beneficiará de um único ponto de entrada, fluxos de trabalho documentados e suporte contínuo. Isso resulta em melhor desempenho, desenvolvimento mais rápido e menos tempo gasto na solução de problemas.
AI_HUB_PAGE.AI_ACTION.LIST.FIRST.SUBTITL: As ferramentas de IA que fornecemos podem mostrar quais ativos cripto suportamos, incluindo dados essenciais de mercado – de forma confiável e extremamente rápida!
AI_HUB_PAGE.AI_ACTION.LIST.SECOND.TITLE: Acompanhar status da transação
AI_HUB_PAGE.AI_ACTION.LIST.SECOND.SUBTIT: Você definitivamente quer verificar se sua troca está ocorrendo bem, especialmente com pressa. Não se preocupe, nós temos sua cobertura. Nossa API de status torna as verificações de status tão fáceis quanto atualizar uma página da web.
AI_HUB_PAGE.AI_ACTION.LIST.THIRD.SUBTITL: Desfrute da troca de mais de 1.000 moedas, integrada diretamente na sua ferramenta de IA. Todo o poder da ChangeNOW agora está disponível em qualquer lugar – do seu computador doméstico ao seu chatbot de mensagens pessoal.
AI_HUB_PAGE.AI_ACTION.LIST.FOURTH.TITLE: Obter suporte
AI_HUB_PAGE.AI_ACTION.LIST.FOURTH.SUBTIT: Algo aconteceu? Não entre em pânico: nossa rica base de conhecimento também é acessível por IA. Basta perguntar ao seu assistente – ele encontrará uma resposta ou o redirecionará para suporte humano 24 horas por dia, 7 dias por semana.
AI_HUB_PAGE.BENEFITS.TITLE: Benefícios para todos
AI_HUB_PAGE.BENEFITS.LIST.FIRST.TITLE: Humanos
AI_HUB_PAGE.BENEFITS.LIST.FIRST.TEXT: A IA traz um pouco de magia ao seu processo de troca rotineiro, tornando-o mais intuitivo. O ChangeNOW Buddy ajuda as pessoas a obter estimativas, criar swaps e verificar o status de suas transações com mais facilidade.
AI_HUB_PAGE.BENEFITS.LIST.SECOND.TITLE: Agentes
AI_HUB_PAGE.BENEFITS.LIST.SECOND.TEXT: ChangeNOW está pronto para a próxima geração de finanças orientadas por IA. Nosso conjunto de ferramentas oferece aos agentes uma maneira padronizada de descobrir, entender e interagir com a plataforma.
AI_HUB_PAGE.HOW_IT_WORKS.LIST.FIRST.TEXT: A IA acessa o ecossistema ChangeNOW em tempo real através de pontos de entrada otimizados.
AI_HUB_PAGE.HOW_IT_WORKS.LIST.SECOND.TEX: Em seguida, ele se conecta aos nossos fluxos de trabalho e corresponde à sua solicitação.
AI_HUB_PAGE.HOW_IT_WORKS.LIST.THIRD.TEXT: Quando tudo estiver claro, a IA executa sua solicitação e completa sua tarefa!
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHY_AI.TITLE: Por que se tornar nativo em IA
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHAT_NEXT.LIST.SECOND.TITLE: Atualizações regulares
AI_HUB_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.0.ANSWER: Nosso servidor MCP expande as capacidades do seu agente integrando-o com a ChangeNOW. O processo de configuração varia para diferentes plataformas. Pergunte ao seu agente se ele suporta o protocolo MCP e anexe a URL do nosso servidor para obter instruções: mcp.changenow.io/mcp
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHY_AI.LIST.FIRST.TEXT: Agentes de IA, carteiras, assistentes e ferramentas de automação precisam de mais do que uma interface tradicional. Eles funcionam melhor com MCPs especializados, documentação clara e estruturada e cenários predefinidos.
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHY_AI.LIST.SECOND.TITLE: Descoberta e ação mais fáceis
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHY_AI.LIST.SECOND.TEXT: Estamos tornando o ecossistema ChangeNOW mais fácil para os agentes encontrarem, entenderem e executarem fluxos de trabalho orientados a criptomoedas.
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHY_AI.LIST.THIRD.TITLE: Melhor experiência para todos
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHY_AI.LIST.THIRD.TEXT: Mesmo se você não executar agentes de IA, você também pode se beneficiar dessas atualizações! Por exemplo, o ChangeNOW Buddy permite que todos interajam com o ecossistema. Nenhuma configuração adicional é necessária.
AI_HUB_PAGE.BUILT_FOR_SAFETY.TITLE: Construído para segurança
Nossas soluções de IA não revelam nem interagem com suas chaves privadas. Na verdade, nenhum dado sensível é divulgado! Nossas soluções de IA e API criam apenas trocas verificáveis com parâmetros definidos pelo usuário, sem envolver nenhuma transação real de blockchain.
AI_HUB_PAGE.BUILT_FOR_SAFETY.LIST.SECOND: Todas as nossas ferramentas são completamente testadas e instruídas para operar de acordo com os padrões de segurança. Exigimos que a IA produza o ID de troca e outros parâmetros, incluindo links diretos. Qualquer pessoa pode validar que a troca criada corresponde à intenção inicial.
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHAT_NEXT.LIST.THIRD.TITLE: Ecossistema para IA
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHAT_NEXT.LIST.THIRD.TEXT:
Nossa visão de longo prazo é tornar todo o ecossistema acessível para IA. Quer seus agentes precisem:
  • Integrar o gateway de pagamento NOWPayments
  • Controlar carteiras não custodiantes com a NOW Wallet
  • Acessar diretamente dados de blockchain via NOWNodes
  • Ou até mesmo gerenciar sua conta ChangeNOW Pro
Tudo é projetado para funcionar perfeitamente e garantir a interoperabilidade.
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHAT_NEXT.LIST.THIRD.TEXT.MO: Nossa visão de longo prazo é tornar todo o ecossistema ChangeNOW — incluindo NOWPayments, NOW Wallet, NOWNodes, contas Pro e muito mais — acessível por IA. Qualquer tarefa cripto que você tenha em mente, nossos produtos são projetados para funcionar perfeitamente juntos, garantindo interoperabilidade em todo o ecossistema.

AI_HUB_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.2.ANSWER: Isso significa que a exchange está sendo tornada mais fácil para os sistemas de IA descobrirem, entenderem e usarem por meio de interfaces padronizadas, documentos públicos e recursos legíveis por máquina.
AI_HUB_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.3.ANSWER: Estamos trabalhando continuamente para nos alinhar aos padrões modernos de descoberta de IA, como OpenAPI, LLMs.txt e muito mais. Isso garante que seus agentes de IA entendam nossos serviços com clareza e interajam de forma confiável.
AI_HUB_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.4.QUESTION: Isso é apenas para desenvolvedores?
AI_HUB_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.4.ANSWER: Não. Nossas ferramentas são projetadas para todos que executam agentes e ferramentas de IA.

AI_HUB_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.5.ANSWER: Nossos recursos de IA incluem o servidor MCP, ChangeNOW Buddy, especificação OpenAPI e llms.txt.
MULTICHAIN_BRIDGE_PAGE.FAQ_SECTION.ITEMS: Qual é a diferença entre uma ponte cross-chain unidirecional e bidirecional?

Uma ponte unidirecional permite que os usuários movam ativos em apenas uma direção entre redes ou tokens. Essa configuração é normalmente usada para cenários como migrações de rede ou lançamentos de Mainnet, onde a conversão é pretendida como final.

Uma ponte bidirecional permite o movimento de ativos em ambas as direções. Os usuários podem converter livremente entre redes ou versões de tokens, tornando-a adequada para interoperabilidade contínua e suporte a várias redes.

A escolha depende do seu caso de uso: pontes unidirecionais são usadas para transições controladas e irreversíveis, enquanto pontes bidirecionais suportam a troca contínua entre ativos.

Após enviar uma solicitação, a equipe entrará em contato dentro de 2 dias úteis. A partir daí, seu gerente pessoal orienta você durante o processo e fornece um serviço de ponte multicadeia personalizado. O cronograma de integração depende dos requisitos do projeto e do nível de personalização.
Sem taxas ocultas ou marcações de serviço. A Multichain Bridge cobra zero taxas de serviço. As taxas de rede são transparentes e configuráveis — pague você mesmo ou repasse aos usuários.

Não há restrições rígidas para tokens recém-lançados. Você tem o poder de lançar e suportar qualquer novo ativo, sem necessidade de listagem em exchange centralizada ou descentralizada. Uma ponte de token cripto personalizada desbloqueia trocas, distribuição e casos de uso críticos, como Eventos de Geração de Token (TGE), lançamentos de Mainnet ou staking. Cada configuração é precisamente adaptada ao seu projeto, garantindo que a configuração se ajuste às suas necessidades e objetivos exclusivos, livre de limitações predefinidas.
Precisamos de implantação de contrato inteligente, ou é totalmente gerenciado pela ChangeNOW?

Você não precisa lidar com a configuração técnica por conta própria.

A ponte multicadeia para criptomoedas é totalmente gerenciada, com uma configuração personalizada para o seu projeto. Seu gerente pessoal orienta todo o processo, para que você não precise implantar nenhum contrato inteligente interno.

Sim, as configurações da ponte são flexíveis e podem ser ajustadas de acordo com suas necessidades.

Você pode configurar parâmetros importantes, como direção da ponte (unidirecional ou bidirecional), taxas de câmbio e como as taxas de rede são tratadas. Como a solução foi projetada para ser adaptável e personalizada para o seu projeto, você pode fazer alterações conforme seus requisitos evoluem.
Como as transações com falha são tratadas?

As transações seguem parâmetros predefinidos em um ambiente controlado, em vez de recuperação ad hoc. Ao gerenciar liquidez, rotas e direção da ponte, você minimiza falhas de execução, pois as trocas ocorrem apenas em condições configuradas. Nossa infraestrutura usa fluxos de carteiras quentes e frias monitoradas para rastrear o status nas redes de origem e destino. Quaisquer problemas, como liquidez insuficiente ou erros de rede, são resolvidos dentro dessa configuração gerenciada. Todos os casos são rastreados e revisados com a assistência de um gerente pessoal.
Como isso se compara à listagem em CEX/DEX em termos de liquidez e exposição?

A ponte de criptomoedas multicadeia segue um modelo diferente dos listados tradicionais em CEX ou DEX. Em vez de depender de exchanges externas, você ativa seu ativo para trocas diretamente no ecossistema ChangeNOW, tornando-o acessível para mais de 3000 parceiros e milhões de usuários sem passar por procedimentos de listagem. Seu ativo é distribuído pela rede de parceiros desde o primeiro dia para oferecer suporte a casos de uso importantes, sem aguardar aprovações de exchange. Você fornece e controla a liquidez, define parâmetros de troca e não depende de livros de ordens externos. As listagens dependem de terceiros. A ponte oferece acesso direto, controle e distribuição imediata no ecossistema.

SWAP.FAQ.ITEMS.1.ANSWER: The crypto bridge is designed to enable asset and data movement across different blockchains. Due to the isolated nature of blockchain platforms, interoperability is provided by a cross-chain bridge: it locks assets on one chain and issues its equivalent tokens on another.
SWAP.FAQ.ITEMS.2.QUESTION: How long does it take to bridge crypto?
SWAP.FAQ.ITEMS.2.ANSWER: In the case of crypto bridging, this greatly depends on a blockchain network: over ChangeNOW, the most cross-chain bridging operations take less than 5 minutes to complete. However, congestion on networks like the Arbitrum bridge or Solana bridge can sometimes cause delays.
SWAP.FAQ.ITEMS.3.QUESTION: Where can I bridge BTC with the Avalanche Bridge?
SWAP.FAQ.ITEMS.3.ANSWER: ChangeNOW's token bridge solutions can facilitate swapping BTC for Avalanche-compatible assets quickly and securely.
SWAP.FAQ.ITEMS.4.QUESTION: What is cross-chain?
SWAP.FAQ.ITEMS.4.ANSWER: Cross-chain refers to the interoperability between blockchains that allows seamless asset and data movement across networks. Bridges like those offered by ChangeNOW enable this process, which helps users swap tokens between different ecosystems, such as Ethereum, Solana, and Arbitrum.
SWAP.FAQ.ITEMS.5.QUESTION: How does a cross-chain bridge work?
SWAP.FAQ.ITEMS.5.ANSWER: A cross-chain bridge works by locking assets on the source chain and minting an equivalent amount on the destination chain. For example, if you use a defi bridge to move SOL from Solana to Ethereum, the bridge locks the original SOL and releases a bridge coin representing SOL on Ethereum (wrapped Solana, or wSol). Some bridges use liquidity pools to facilitate instant swaps without locking assets.

BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_1.TITLE: Corporate Responsibility
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_1.TEXT_1: We believe that the crypto industry should be based on the principles of transparency, mutual trust, and constant improvement.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_1.TEXT_2: ChangeNOW seeks to maintain accountability to its customers, employees, and the broad crypto community. We do it through strict AML compliance, social change encouragement, regular service quality upgrades, and community involvement.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_1.CUSTOMER.TITLE: Customer
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_1.CUSTOMER.TEXT: We value our customers, protect them from scams, always advocate their interests, and help to keep their assets safe.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_1.COMMUNITY.TEXT:
We promote mass adoption of crypto and seek to turn the crypto world into
a healthy environment for collaboration and innovation.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_1.INDUSTRY.TITLE: Industry
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_1.INDUSTRY.TEXT: We believe that the crypto industry is no place for money laundering, dodgy schemes, and unlawful activities.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CASES.split-yo: We help our customers to avoid double-spending caused by the BCH/BSV/BCHA unsplit coins problem. Even if the transaction has already gone through, we will try to return the funds within a 24-hour period, if it is physically possible.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CUSTOMERS.TEXT: Our key priority is protecting users from all kinds of scams, along with helping to deal with consequences of unfortunate network malfunctions. The ChangeNOW support team is available 24/7 and ready to give guidance to the customers who faced operational difficulties. We always return assets lost due to accidental sendings or unsplit coins transactions, for instance, in case of BCH/BSV/BCHA failed transactions.

Here at ChangeNOW, we do all in our power to help our customers restore justice in case a crypto fraud has been committed. ChangeNOW fully cooperates with the police and other executive bodies that investigate crypto-related crimes. We leave no stone unturned in order to help our customers get back what is rightfully theirs.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.COMMUNITY.TITL: Recognizing our responsibilities to the global community
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.COMMUNITY.TEXT: Raising trust towards the crypto industry is in our own hands. A way of contributing to the community that we find crucial is promoting mass adoption of crypto. In our ongoing efforts to accelerate the widespread use of digital currencies, we constantly improve the quality of our services and perfect customer relations. The ChangeNOW team wishes to establish trust within the industry and create a safe environment for crypto operations.

A fundamental part of community involvement is charity. We choose not to make a public display of our philanthropic initiatives, making an exception for the cases that affect us profoundly in some way. For one, we donated 1 BTC for Notre Dame restorations through our partner's charity fund. Another charitable collaboration of ours is Monero Instant Exchange: part of the service’s profits are donated directly to the Monero Project.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.INDUSTRY.TITLE: Over $16,500,000 returned in total
We are convinced that the crypto industry is no place for dirty money, unlawful operations, and shady business schemes. Despite the crypto community's common efforts, hacks and scams still frequently occur on the market, casting a shadow over the entire industry. However, we strongly believe that a scam-free future for crypto is quite conceivable. It will require a great deal of trust and a safe environment – and building them is exactly what ChangeNOW is aimed at.

The ChangeNOW team has put in place a number of AML mechanisms designed to detect fraud and filter suspicious transactions. We are not to disclose the exact KYT, KYC, and KYB procedures that every transaction undergoes for obvious security reasons.  To make sure no fraudulent activity escapes our notice, we use both an automated internal compliance check algorithm and an external AML-compliance provider.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CASES.emerald-: On September 9th 2020, a DeFi project called Emerald Mine (EMD) committed an exit scam, appropriating nearly $2.5 million worth of crypto. 135020 EOS have been stopped on ChangeNOW, thanks to our risk management system.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CASES.uniswap-: ChangeNOW is the first instant crypto exchange service to integrate a decentralized liquidity provider into its platform – Uniswap. This collaboration allows anyone to use ChangeNOW as a one stop bridge between ERC20 assets and easily swap tokens listed on Uniswap.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CASES.the-stor: The Story of How a Cryptocurrency Exchange Service Lost Money, Intentionally

During the DOGE hype in the end of January 2021, ChangeNOW processed all the stuck DOGE transactions at the initial estimated rate, suffering substantial losses in order to deliver the service promised to the customers.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CASES.report-o: Report on the Temporary Slowdown of BTC Processing

On August 6, 2021, one of the nodes crucial to Bitcoin exchange functionality on ChangeNOW temporarily stopped working. We had to activate two backup nodes before the service became fully operational again.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CASES.changeno: ChangeNOW Returns $15M Lost in Compound Malfunction

After the Compound DeFi platform lost funds due to a bug, ChangeNOW received a 45505 COMP transaction request involving the misplaced COMP tokens. It had been flagged by our AML system, and we returned the assets to Compound.

In recent months, there have been numerous cases of Ripple giveaway scams where people lost huge amounts of money. ChangeNOW does its best to help victims, and here is how we helped return $100,000 worth of XRP to rightful owners.
ChangeNOW Returns 60 ETH Stolen by Phishing Uniswap App

Phishing, along with rug pulls and smart contract hacks, has been one of greatest threats to users’ funds in recent years. We managed to withhold compromised 60 ETH worth $210,000 at the time and return them to their rightful owner. Here is what happened.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CASES.bitrue-p: $320,000 returned to Singapore-based crypto exchange Bitrue

After his exchange had suffered a hack, we established the malicious addresses and immediately blacklisted them. $320,000 were attempted to be transferred through ChangeNOW - we froze them and returned to Bitrue.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CASES.upbit-ha: Money laundering prevented after Upbit hack

Soon after this South Korean crypto exchange was compromised, our risk prevention system stopped the test transaction of 9 ETH - we immediately froze the funds and transferred them to a secure storage.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CASES.gatehub-: 500,000 XRP returned to a hacked wallet service

In June 2019, 2.5 million XRP from hacked GateHub crypto wallets were sent to us as fraudsters wanted to cash out. We managed to retain more than 500,000 XRP. These funds were returned to the wallet service.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CASES.changeno: 100% of funds worth $500,000 retained upon Bithumb hack
When the exchange Bithumb was hacked, over $500,000 ended up on ChangeNOW. We froze all stolen deposits. They were stored in a secure cold wallet until an official request from law enforcement.
In September 2020, Eterbase exchange was hacked. Our risk management system stopped a transaction of 600,000 MATIC, that were subsequently returned to the exchange.
ChangeNOW Returns $100k to XRP Scam Giveaway Victims

LIGHTNING.INFO_ARTICLE: LightningNOW’s main goal is running a stable, reliable, and well-connected Lightning node to help provide easier channel creation between Lightning Network users.
LIGHTNING.INFO_ARTICLE_2: If you need us to open an inbound channel to your node, just hit us up for a payment channel to our node. We'll get back to you shortly with an inbound payment channel.
LIGHTNING.FEATURES_ARTICLE_1: Lightning transactions allow you to make instant payments without having to wait for any confirmations. All payments are instantly secured by smart contracts without having to transact on-chain.
LIGHTNING.FEATURES_ARTICLE_2: By transacting and settling off-chain, the Lightning Network allows for extremely low fees, which allows for instant micropayments in a couple of clicks.
LIGHTNING.FEATURES_ARTICLE_3: Lightning Network is capable of an astounding amount of transactions per second across the network. Attaching payment per action/click is now possible without custodians.
LIGHTNING.FEATURES_ARTICLE_4: Cross-chain atomic exchanges can occur off-chain instantly with  blockchain consensus rules. So long as the chains can support the same crypto hash function, it is possible to preform trustless cross-chain exchanges within seconds.

DEV_KIT_LOANS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.2.QUESTION: What are the operational specifics of ChangeNOW's fiat gateway services?
DEV_KIT_LOANS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.2.ANSWER:
ChangeNOW's fiat gateway services allow users to buy and sell cryptocurrencies using traditional fiat currencies like USD, EUR, and more. This service ensures a seamless bridge between the traditional financial system and the crypto world, making it easier for users to enter and exit the crypto market. Key specifics include:
  • Simple and quick transactions: Users can quickly buy crypto with fiat or convert crypto back to fiat.
  • Wide range of fiat currencies: Supports multiple fiat currencies to cater to a global audience.
  • Secure and compliant: Ensures high levels of security and compliance with regulatory.
  • No-KYC: ChangeNOW supports no-KYC (Know Your Customer) fiat-to-crypto exchanges up to 700 EUR!
DEV_KIT_LOANS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.3.QUESTION: How does ChangeNOW's fee structure work?
DEV_KIT_LOANS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.3.ANSWER:
ChangeNOW prides itself on transparency with our fee structures. The exchange rates displayed include all fees, ensuring there are no hidden charges. These are the possible fees that are included in the transaction:
  • network fee for the deposit transaction from a customer's wallet;
  • network fee for transferring coins to our liquidity provider;
  • trading fees that our liquidity providers charge;
  • network fee for sending the exchanged funds to the customer.
The fees are competitive and reflect the service's commitment to providing value. The exact fee can vary based on the specific transaction, cryptocurrency pair, and market conditions. Users can always check the exact fee before confirming any transaction. Read more about ChangeNOW's fee structures.
DEV_KIT_LOANS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.4.QUESTION: How can I start integrating ChangeNOW into a new or existing project?
DAPPS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.0.QUESTION: How to integrate ChangeNOW into my dApp?
DAPPS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.0.ANSWER:
To integrate ChangeNOW into your decentralized application (dApp), you can use the ChangeNOW API. Here’s how:
  • Get API Key: Register on the ChangeNOW platform to obtain your API key.
  • API Documentation: ChangeNOW offers comprehensive documentation that guides you through the whole integration process.
  • Implementation: Follow the step-by-step guide to implement the API, enabling crypto exchange functionality within your dApp.
DAPPS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.1.QUESTION: Are crypto exchanges dApps?
DAPPS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.1.ANSWER: Not all crypto exchanges are decentralized. Traditional exchanges are centralized, meaning they are operated by a central entity. However, some exchanges, known as decentralized exchanges (DEXs), function as dApps, facilitating peer-to-peer trading without intermediaries.
DAPPS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.2.QUESTION: How to create a dApp?
DAPPS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.2.ANSWER:
Creating a dApp involves several main steps:
  • Choose a Blockchain: Select a blockchain platform like Ethereum or Binance Smart Chain.
  • Smart Contracts: Build smart contracts using languages like Solidity.
  • Development Tools: Utilize tools like Truffle or Hardhat for development.
  • Frontend and Backend Development: Create your app's front and back end.
  • Deployment: Deploy your smart contract, making your dApp accessible to users.
DAPPS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.3.QUESTION: What is a crypto exchange API?
DAPPS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.3.ANSWER:
A crypto exchange API allows developers to integrate exchange functionalities into their dapps. The API provides endpoints for:
  • Exchange: Execute buy and sell orders.

BITCOIN_HALVING.HOW_IT_WORKS.TEXTS.2.DES: There have been three halvings in Bitcoin history: in 2012, in 2016, and in 2020. By examining the aftermath of the previous halvings, investors and enthusiasts can gain valuable insights into possible trends and market behaviors. The last Bitcoin halving event in 2020 caused a substantial bull market that saw Bitcoin reach unprecedented highs, underlining the significant impact halving events can have on market sentiment and valuation. With each of previous halvings investors became more and more bullish, though it's important to remember that past performance is not always indicative of future results. Always DYOR! : )
BITCOIN_HALVING.HOW_IT_WORKS.TEXTS.3.TIT: How to Keep Updated during the Bitcoin’s 4th Halving
BITCOIN_HALVING.HOW_IT_WORKS.TEXTS.3.DES: Trading around the Bitcoin halving demands a nuanced understanding of cryptocurrency markets and the specific factors that drive Bitcoin's price. The halving reduces the rate at which new bitcoins are created and thus, the rate at which the total supply grows. This reduction in supply growth could lead to increased demand and, potentially, higher prices (be aware of possible risks while trading!) if demand for Bitcoin continues to grow at a steady rate or increases. However, market dynamics are influenced by numerous factors, making precise predictions challenging. Platforms like ChangeNOW facilitate the crypto exchange process by offering a user-friendly interface and instant exchange options, allowing traders to swiftly respond to market movements caused by the halving.
BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.0.QUESTION: How Investors Should Prepare for BTC Halving 2024?
BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.0.ANSWER: Investors should monitor the halving countdown, stay informed on market trends, and consider diversifying their investment strategies to mitigate risks and capitalize on potential opportunities presented by the halving event.
BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.1.QUESTION: How are Miners Preparing for Bitcoin Halving 2024?
BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.1.ANSWER: Miners are investing in more energy-efficient mining hardware and exploring renewable energy sources to reduce operational costs and improve profitability in anticipation of reduced block rewards.
BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.2.QUESTION: How Many Bitcoin Halvings are Left?
BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.2.ANSWER: The halving process will continue approximately every four years until the last Bitcoin is mined around 2140, leaving several more halvings to anticipate.
BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.3.QUESTION: What Happened the Last Time Bitcoin Halved?

How to exchange Bitcoin for cash

If you want to withdraw Bitcoin in cash, there are special Bitcoin ATMs installed all around the world, you can check if there is one in your area. ChangeNOW will implement fiat withdrawals by Q4 2020.
What is the Bitcoin exchange rate

You can check the current Bitcoin exchange rate in our exchange window, just type in the desired amount of BTC you want to exchange. Note that you can choose classic exchange rate, if you want to get the best deal at the moment of exchange or fixed rate, if you want to get the exact amount displayed.
How to start a Bitcoin exchange
To initiate Bitcoin exchange simply open ChangeNOW, select currencies you want to exchange, choose classic or fixed rate, tap on the ‘Exchange’ button and follow the instructions.
There are plenty of ways to exchange cryptocurrencies, however all of them have some disadvantages. Custodial exchanges are convenient, but they require registration and you hold your assets with personal information on a third party server. You can exchange it peer to peer without any mediator, however all the risks in this case are also on you.

The most secure way to exchange crypto is by using a non-custodial exchange that does not require registration, does not take hold on your funds and has earned users’ trust - such as ChangeNOW.
How to buy Bitcoin without an exchange

You can look for a cryptocurrency ATM in proximity to your location, or find a cryptocurrency broker to do it for you. If there aren’t any - use ChangeNOW, as it is always in your pocket and ready to help.

ChangeNOW is simple to use, and it doesn’t require an account to boot. It automatically looks up the ADX price for you. Based on that, it calculates the final AdEx exchange rate and completes the transaction faster than the competition.
How to Buy AdEx With the Lowest Fees?

To help you trade with the lowest fees and get the most out of our service, we offer two options: classic rate and fixed rate. The classic rate will display the expected amount from the trade, based on the current situation on the market. However, the actual amount you’ll receive may differ due to price fluctuations and ADX volatility. The fixed-rate option uses the actual amount you will receive, and ChangeNOW deals with all risks and fees. Generally, the fixed rate is a bit lower than the classic rate, but you can know the exact numbers before you click the Exchange button!

CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_XMR.TEXT_3: It is one of the world's most recognized and respected privacy coins. This coin has a very interesting origin. Back in 2014, a Bitcointalk forum contributor named “Thankful_for_Today” forked the code for Bytecoin and called it BitMonero. Thankful_for_Today then exited the development stage and after a few days, a group of developers that included Johnny Mnemonic took over the forked project and renamed it Monero. The crypto had strong privacy and this led to the strong growth of the community, and by 2016, it had the highest transaction volumes of any crypto. However, the big break came in January 2017, when it was adopted by Gregory Maxwell (Bitcoin core developer)’s algorithm called confidential transactions for hiding amounts that were being transacted. This initiated a significant gain, and during the 2017 crypto bull market, it peaked at an all-time high of $495.84. CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_BCH.TEXT_2: People new to crypto often find it hard to distinguish between Bitcoin Cash (BCH) and Bitcoin (BTC). The key difference is that Bitcoin (BTC) is the older chain, while the latter is a fork. While this coin was created in July 2017 through a hard fork of Bitcoin, the concept of it dates back to as far back as late 2015. At the time, there were growing concerns about Bitcoin’s scalability, and a section of the community wanted to accommodate more transactions by expanding the block size. One of the key proponents of a block size increase was Roger Ver (the main figure behind it). When consensus failed, Ver and like-minded investors forked Bitcoin and created Bitcoin Cash, a similar chain, but with a bigger block size. Since its launch, this coin’s price has moved in tandem with the rest of the crypto market and hit an all-time high of $4,355.62 in December 2017. It has since dropped and ranks, 5th, with a market cap of $5.493 billion. You can check out our 2020 Bitcoin Cash price prediction here.
CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_BCH.TEXT_4: The main defining feature for this chain is scalability due to having a larger block size. This makes it one of the most reliable networks that can run without lagging due to congestion. It also has low transaction fees, and is one of the most secure blockchains in the market.

CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_DOGE.TEXT_3: To a lot of people, it at first comes across as a joke, but behind the easy demeanor is a serious cryptocurrency. It was founded as a humor coin made in the likeness of an internet meme for Doge, a Shiba Inu dog. The project was the brainchild of Jack Palmer and Billy Markus and started trading on the 6th of December 2013. Due to the popularity of the Doge meme at the time, it was an instant hit and a few weeks after launch, it was up by over 300%. Since then, coin has grown tremendously and is one of the top 40 cryptos by market capitalization. Over the years the community has sponsored multiple mainstream events. For instance, on March 25th, 2014, the community raised 67.8 million tokens to sponsor Josh Wise, a NASCAR driver, who went to win a spot in the all-star race. In terms of price, it has largely followed the motions of the rest of the crypto market. It hit its all-time high in 2017 and has since corrected with the rest of the market. It currently ranks 31st and has a market cap of $439,886,990. You can check out our 2020 Dogecoin price prediction here.

DEFI_PORTAL.PROJECT_INFO_BAL_ARTICLE: Balancer is a decentralized finance project made for automatic market-making. Ethereum-based DeFi token BAL is used as a governance tool and a liquidity provider. There are 8 assets supported by Balancer’s DeFi network, including Ethereum and ERC20 projects. Balancer doesn’t use external oracles - asset prices are determined by trades within the network instead. Essentially, BAL is a decentralized finance system that allows for creation of customizable pools and gives an opportunity for its members to earn profit from trading fees.
DEFI_PORTAL.PROJECT_INFO_REN_ARTICLE: REN decentralized finance project was created to allow for cross-chain transfer of coins. REN’s DeFi toolkit is quite original: users have access to Dark pools where transactions stay secure, anonymous and happen in a trustless environment. RenVM’s native REN tokens are used to pay fees for transactions that use the REN Virtual Machine. It is connected to Darknodes, which identify and process transactions between blockchains.
DEFI_PORTAL.PROJECT_INFO_LRC_ARTICLE: Loopring is a decentralized finance platform created to enable crypto movement between exchanges. It is not a traditional decentralized exchange, but rather a non-custodial order book running on Ethereum. LRC is a DeFi native token of the platform that is paid to miners, who ensure the order completion or cancellation on the Loopring DeFi system. LRC is a decentralized finance token that can settle transactions outside of the Ethereum network, hence lowering gas costs.

CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_ETH.TEXT_3: Now it is the second-largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization. Its history dates back to 2013 when programmer Vitalik Buterin conceptualized the idea of a decentralized virtual machine. In August 2014, he did a crowd sale and cryptocurrency was born on the 30th of July, 2015. Like most crypto projects, this one has had its ups and downs in the course of its existence. Just a year after it went live, hackers exploited a weakness in the DAO project’s smart contracts and made off with funds worth $50 million. This prompted the community to vote on a chain split that saw the theft reversed. The original chain continued as Ethereum Classic, while the new chain became the popular cryptocurrency as it is today. Pricewise, currency has recorded significant gains over the last decade. Back in 2015, it was trading at lows of $0.42, and in the crypto rally of 2017, it tested a high of $1,432.88. It is currently trading at sub $700 levels. The programmer sets conditions that trigger off the execution of the program. One of the features that allow this to work is the Ethereum Virtual Machine. This is the underlying infrastructure that allows for smart contracts to be created and executed. Another key feature is Decentralized Autonomous Organizations (DAOs). These are community-driven organizations that allow ETH holders to vote on key decisions about the platform.

One of its key features is its ring signatures. This is the way of ensuring that transactions cannot be traced back to the sender. Essentially, it's like putting a hundred fingerprints on a dollar note making it impossible to determine who it belongs to. Another interesting feature is the Public-View feature. This feature allows the sender to let other people see their public address if the need arises. This feature lowers the risk of the project getting in trouble with regulators due to its highly advanced privacy capabilities. 
It also has an in-built scalability feature. This works by allowing the network to review all past transactions and automatically make changes to the block-size to factor in an increase in transaction volumes.

CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_XRP.TEXT_3: It is the 3rd largest cryptocurrency by market cap. It is also one of the oldest cryptocurrencies in existence, because the idea is a little older than Bitcoin itself. In 2005, Jed McCaleb came up with the idea of a financial services system that would act as a secure mode of payment for online transactions. He then approached Arthur Britto and David Schwartz, who built it with the help of Ryan Fugger, who as far back as 2005, had built such a system and named it Opencoin. It is the Opencoin system that formed the basis of Ripplelabs, and the cryptocurrency that debuted in the crypto markets as Ripple in 2012. Like most cryptocurrencies, XRP became most visible to the masses during the 2017 crypto rally. At the time, the crypto rallied to a high of over $3.5 on December 29th, 2017, and with a market cap of $73 billion. Like other cryptocurrencies, it has since corrected and currently has a market cap of about $13.67 billion.
CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_XRP.TEXT_5: The currencies ledger has several features that put it at the forefront of the crypto revolution. One of its key features is speed. This currency is one of the fastest ways to send money globally. One can send money using it to any part of the world in under 4 seconds. Related to speed is the feature of scalability. A major advantage that centralized systems such as Visa have over cryptos is that of scalability. Most blockchains can handle very few transactions per second, making them impractical for large scale use in the finance industry. XPR does not have this problem and can consistently handle more than 1500 transactions per second. In fact, as of July 15th, 2019, it could handle over 65,000 transactions per second, making it competitive as a global payment system. The other key feature is decentralization. In the past, there were concerns that XRP is a centralized coin where RippleLabs controls all the validator nodes. This notion has since been dispelled as the network is run by more than 150 independent validators spread across the world. It is also for this reason that back in 2018, there was a rebranding from Ripple (XRP) to XRP (XRP). The goal was to help investors understand the difference between the company and the coin. Lastly, it is eco-friendly. Unlike proof-of-work coins that require energy to produce, the currency’s ledger settles transactions without mining.

It is this project that paved the way for the creation of the Stellar Development Foundation that was developed in collaboration with Patrick Collision, the CEO of Stripe, with Stripe giving seed capital of $3 million. The project was launched as a decentralized network using Stellar Lumens (XLM) as the native cryptocurrency. Since then, the network has undergone lots of improvements, including the launch of a new consensus algorithm that was launched in 2015. Like all cryptocurrencies, this one has had its ups and downs in terms of price. It peaked in 2017 for $0.93 but has since corrected along with the rest of the market. DEFI_PORTAL.PROJECT_INFO_MKR_ARTICLE: Maker is a DeFi platform that is used to maintain the DAI stablecoin. DAI coin is based on smart contracts powered by Ethereum and Maker is a decentralized finance tool that stabilizes the price of DAI by creating new MKRs. DeFi protocols in place regulate the price of the stablecoin in a transparent way with collateralized loans. MKR as a decentralized finance instrument is one of the oldest on the market - it was created in 2014 and has since earned its popularity in the crypto community at large.
DEFI_PORTAL.PROJECT_INFO_LEND_ARTICLE: Aave is a DeFi protocol that is used to offer instant credit. Based on Ethereum, LEND is a decentralized finance tool working on a collateralized lending system. DeFi makes borrowing money simple - lenders provide liquidity by depositing money into a pool, while borrowers that need a loan have to provide collateral in other currency. Aave has been a household name in decentralized finance space since 2017, and has grown significantly over the years it’s been on the market.
DEFI_PORTAL.PROJECT_INFO_SNX_ARTICLE: Synthetics Network Token is a decentralized finance protocol based on Ethereum. SNX’s DeFi system is similar to Maker, where the platform’s tokens are used to create assets called Synths. Those synthetic assets copy the price of ‘real world’ assets. To buy and trade those, one has to use SNX - the decentralized finance token of the platform. The Synthetix DeFi project initially started as a conventional stablecoin Havven that got rebranded in late 2018.
DEFI_PORTAL.PROJECT_INFO_COMP_ARTICLE: Compound is a decentralized finance lending platform that supports multiple cryptocurrencies. Its native DeFi asset COMP (or cToken) is used as a basis of the Compound DeFi platform. Ethereum-based Compound offers decentralized governance on a blockchain. To vote for any changes to be made on the decentralized finance platform, COMP tokens should be bought with fiat or other cryptocurrencies.
DEFI_PORTAL.PROJECT_INFO_KNC_ARTICLE: An Ethereum-based Kyber Network is a decentralized finance project that provides instantaneous token exchange. Kyber Network’s DeFi protocol supports 70+ ERC20 projects and swiftness of conversion is provided by crypto funds called reserves. In order to use reserve pools, one has to pay a fee in the ecosystem’s native token, KNC. Decentralized finance projects like Kyber make usage of different dapps easy, as you don’t have to wait for token swaps and tools like KNC bring DeFi closer to everyday adoption of crypto payments.

DEFI_PORTAL.PROJECT_INFO_YFI_ARTICLE: In the decentralized finance space, Yearn.Finance is commonly known as Bitcoin of DeFi due to its price. YFI is an Ethereum ERC20 token that is used for community governance of the ecosystem. Yearn.Finance as a DeFi project stands out as a highly decentralized blockchain, where all decisions are made by the community. This is a good example of a well-organized decentralized finance space. The YFI token also stands out due to the fact that there was no ICO or pre-mine ever.
DEFI_PORTAL.PROJECT_INFO_REP_ARTICLE: Augur is a decentralized finance prediction platform running on Ethereum. Augur’s DeFi functionality has two uses: to create markers and to trade on events. For a small fee in Ethereum, Augur’s users can create a market for any asset they wish. Augur’s DeFi token called REP is used to pay for the odds of trading events happening. With REP at the decentralized platform’s heart and versatile options for prediction bets and markets creation, Augur is one of the most interesting projects in the niche right now.

BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.5.QUESTION: What Happens to Miners When the Bitcoin Reward is Halved?
BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.6.QUESTION: What Happens When All 21 Million Bitcoins Have Been Mined?
BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.5.ANSWER: Miners face a significant challenge as the reward for their efforts is reduced, potentially impacting the profitability of mining operations. This adjustment period encourages technological innovation and efficiency improvements among miners, who must optimize their operations to maintain profitability under the new reward structure. Some miners may exit the market, leading to a temporary reduction in the network's hash rate until equilibrium is reached.
BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.6.ANSWER: Reaching the 21 million cap is a long-term prospect, expected around the year 2140. After this point, miners will no longer receive new bitcoins for block rewards and will rely solely on transaction fees as compensation for their role in processing transactions and securing the Bitcoin network. This shift could fundamentally change the economics of mining and Bitcoin's security model.
BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.7.QUESTION: Why Does Bitcoin Halve?
BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.7.ANSWER: The halving mechanism is Bitcoin's solution to prevent inflation and ensure a controlled supply, similar to the way central banks manage the supply of traditional currencies. By halving the block reward, Bitcoin ensures that its total supply will never exceed 21 million coins, making it a deflationary asset by design. This scarcity is a key factor driving Bitcoin's adoption and valuation as a digital store of value.

PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.1.QUES: What exchange fees apply to Permanent Addresses?
PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.1.ANSW: The fees are the same you would see with a regular exchange: network fees and service fees. They are already included in the estimated rate you see. We guarantee no extra charges in the process – what you see is what you get.
PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.2.QUES: What is the maximum amount I can exchange?
PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.2.ANSW: There is no limit to the amount you send – the system will process the exact amount of funds that was sent to the deposit address and pay it out to you in the target currency.
PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.3.ANSW: Sure! Our minimal amounts start with just $2 depending on the exchange pair.
PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.4.QUES: Can I share my Permanent Addresses with other individuals?
PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.4.ANSW: Yes – the sender and the receiver of the funds do not have to be the same person. Use this to convert automated deposits instantly and receive the funds directly in your target currency.
PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.5.QUES: How can I track the process and view my exchange history?
PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.5.ANSW:
The process can be tracked on the exchange page once you create it. Your exchange history is shown on the same page, so we recommend to bookmark it.
Additionally, all of your exchange history is stored in your Pro account – sign up and track you transactions with ease.

BITCOIN_HALVING.TIMER.ADDITIONAL_TEXT: Gear up for the monumental Bitcoin Halving 2024, a cornerstone event in the Bitcoin ecosystem, when the reward for mining bitcoins will be halved from 6.25 to 3.125 bitcoins. This event is pivotal, influencing Bitcoin’s inflation rate, scarcity, and potentially its market value. Let's dive  into the heart of Bitcoin's evolution with the 2024 Bitcoin Halving, exploring its impact on Bitcoin investment, Bitcoin's blockchain technology, and the broader financial markets.
BITCOIN_HALVING.HOW_IT_WORKS.INTRO_TEXT: The Bitcoin Halving 2024 event stands on the horizon as a monumental occurrence within the cryptocurrency realm, symbolizing a crucial phase in the Bitcoin network's lifecycle that enthusiasts, investors, and financial strategists eagerly anticipate. This event, integral to Bitcoin's unique economic model, serves to maintain its deflationary nature by methodically decreasing the rate at which new bitcoins are introduced to the market. Specifically, the Bitcoin Halving 2024 will witness the reward for mining new blocks being halved from the current 6.25 bitcoins to 3.125 bitcoins, a change that directly affects miners but also has broader implications for the Bitcoin market and its valuation.
BITCOIN_HALVING.HOW_IT_WORKS.TEXTS.0.DES: A Bitcoin halving event is a fundamental aspect of Bitcoin's design, occurring every four years, after all 210,000 blocks are mined. This mechanism ensures a gradual reduction in the rate of new bitcoins generated, extending the total time it will take for all bitcoins to be mined. It's a critical feature that helps combat inflation and mimic the natural scarcity properties of physical commodities such as  gold, making Bitcoin a 'digital gold' for the modern era. The halving is not just a technical event; it's an important moment that has historically influenced Bitcoin's price and various aspects of the cryptocurrency ecosystem.
BITCOIN_HALVING.HOW_IT_WORKS.TEXTS.1.TIT: When is the Next Bitcoin Halving?
BITCOIN_HALVING.HOW_IT_WORKS.TEXTS.1.DES: Projected to occur in the third week of April 2024, the exact date of the next Bitcoin halving depends on the mining activity and can slightly vary. Cryptocurrency platforms and analysts closely monitor the Bitcoin blockchain to provide accurate countdowns and forecasts, preparing investors for the event. This anticipation builds a unique market environment where speculation, strategy, and historical data converge to forecast the potential outcomes of the halving.
BITCOIN_HALVING.DISCLAIMER: Disclaimer: Nothing presented on this page represents any kind of investment advice and is merely the opinion of the author. Investing into crypto is a high-risk activity and should be done only after extensive research.
